title: Nature's Wrath: Creepers
description: Adds 13 new biome Creeper variants inspired by the Overworld’s different environments.
body:
**🌿 Nature's Wrath: Creepers**

The world is alive… and it wants you gone.

Nature's Wrath: Creepers adds 13 brand-new Creeper variants that adapt to the biome they inhabit. Wherever you travel, new explosive dangers are waiting, perfectly camouflaged in their environment.

Each Creeper keeps the classic behavior you know and fear, but now fits naturally into the world around it.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**💥 Variants**

Sculk Creeper – Spawns in the Deep Dark

Birch Creeper – Found in forest biomes

Azalea Creeper – Lurks inside lush caves

Jungle Creeper – Hides in jungle biomes

Mushroom Creeper – Appears in mushroom fields

Nether Creeper – Explodes in the Nether

Desert Creeper – Roams desert biomes

Snow Creeper – Emerges in snowy regions

Swamp Creeper – Stalks swamp lands

Skeleton Creeper – Can appear in any biome

TNT Creeper – Spawns everywhere

Drowned Creeper – Found in ocean areas

Loot Creeper – Spawn in all biomes ( Gives random loot when killed )

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🌎 What this mod offers**

✅ More biome immersion
✅ Greater exploration danger
✅ Vanilla-friendly design
✅ Perfect for modpacks
✅ Keeps the classic Creeper experience

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f473afb99fabbd60a091680ee3575e5326d503a.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
